---
project:
  type: website
Author: "Emily Ruvalcaba"

website:
  title: "My Professional Portfolio"

  navbar:
    left:
      - href: index.qmd
        text: Home
      - href: dashboard.qmd
        text: Dashboard
      - href: projects.qmd
        text: Projects
      - href: shiny_apps.qmd
        text: Shiny Apps
      - href: shiny_live.qmd
        text: Shinylive
      - href: slides.qmd
        text: Presentation

format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: true
---

---
title: "Home Page"
---

# Welcome to my Portfolio

## About Me
I am a Senior Cal Poly Pomona student majoring in marketing and throughout the course IBM 3202, I have focused on data analytics, visualization, and business insights.  
My goal is to develop strong technical and analytical skills to work in Marketing roles that require data-driven research and insight in order to make knowledgable buisness decisions.

---

## Career Objective
To pursue a career in marketing analytics where I can apply data storytelling, visualization, and business analyzing tools.

---

## Skills aquired
- Data Visualization 
- Quarto Reporting
- Microsoft Excel
-Microsoft Office
- Basic Web Publishing

---

## Education
- California Polytechic University, Pomona 2024-2027
- Marketing Management, Buisness Administration

---

## Profile Photo
::: {.text-center}

![](images/profile.jpg){width=250px}

:::
